sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Intuit FY26 2Q 총매출 47억 달러, GAAP EPS +49% 개선, 연간 가이던스 유지

keyPoints.text: 2분기 총매출 47억 달러로 호실적을 기록했고, GBS 온라인 에코시스템(+21%)과 소비자 부문(+15%) 모두 고성장을 달성했다.
GAAP 희석 EPS가 2.48달러(+49%), 비GAAP 희석 EPS는 4.15달러(+25%)로 수익성이 크게 개선됐다.
GBS 온라인 에코시스템 매출이 21% 성장하고, Mailchimp 제외 시 GBS 전체 21%, 온라인 에코시스템은 25% 성장을 달성했다.

businessChanges.text: GBS 매출은 32억 달러(+18%)로, QuickBooks Online Accounting이 가격 인상·고객 성장·믹스 효과에 힘입어 24% 성장했고, Online Services는 머니·페이롤 성장에 힘입어 18% 증가했다.
소비자 부문 매출은 15억 달러(+15%)로, Credit Karma가 6억 1,600만 달러(+23%), TurboTax가 5억 8,100만 달러(+12%) 성장을 기록했다.

financialHighlights.text: 2분기 GAAP 영업이익은 8억 5,500만 달러(+44%)로 전년 대비 크게 증가했고, 비GAAP 영업이익은 15억 4,900만 달러(+23%)를 기록했다.
GAAP 기준 2분기 매출은 46억 5,100만 달러(+17%), 비GAAP 영업이익은 15억 4,900만 달러(+23%)로 공시됐다.
GBS 온라인 에코시스템 매출은 25억 달러(+21%)로, Mailchimp 제외 시 온라인 에코시스템 성장률은 25%에 달한다.

watchItems.text: 경영진이 FY26 연간 가이던스를 재확인한 만큼, 3분기 컨퍼런스콜에서 가이던스 상향 가능성과 GBS 성장 지속성을 확인할 필요가 있다.
Mailchimp 제외 GBS 성장률이 21%로 높아지는 만큼, Mailchimp의 기여도 변화가 다음 분기 핵심 관전 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: intuit.com Intuit Reports Strong Second-Quarter Results and Reiterates Full-Year Guidance Global Business Solutions Online Ecosystem Revenue Grew 21 percent; Consumer Revenue Grew 15 percent MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif. - February 26, 2026 - Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU), the global financial technology platform that makes Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, Mailchimp, and Intuit Enterprise Suite, announced financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, which ended January 31. "We delivered an outstanding second quarter, driven by disciplined execution,” said Sasan Goodarzi, chairman and chief executive officer of Intuit. “We are defining a new category at the intersection of AI and human intelligence, one that delivers autonomous, done-for-you experiences, disrupts the traditional assisted tax segment, and provides mid-market enterprises with the AI-native ERP platform they need  Normalized numeric aliases: 21 percent = 21%; 15 percent = 15%.

to win. We’re accelerating execution and innovation to deliver even greater impact for our customers." Financial Highlights For the second quarter, Intuit: • Grew total revenue to $4.7 billion, up 17 percent. • Increased Global Business Solutions revenue to $3.2 billion, up 18 percent; grew Online Ecosystem revenue to $2.5 billion, up 21 percent. Excluding Mailchimp, Global Business Solutions revenue grew 21 percent, and Online Ecosystem revenue grew 25 percent. • Grew Consumer revenue to $1.5 billion, up 15 percent. Increased Credit Karma revenue to $616 million, up 23 percent and TurboTax revenue to $581 million, up 12 percent. •  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.7 billion = 47억 달러; $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $616 million = 6억 1,600만 달러; $581 million = 5억 8,100만 달러; $855 million = 8억 5,500만 달러; $4.7 = 4.7달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $2.48 = 2.48달러; 25 percent = 25%; 49 percent = 49%; 15 percent = 15%; 23 percent = 23%; 12 percent = 12%; 44 percent = 44%.

Unless otherwise noted, all growth rates refer to the current period versus the comparable prior-year period, and the business metrics and associated growth rates refer to worldwide business metrics. Snapshot of Second-quarter Results GAAP Non-GAAP Q2 FY26 Q2 FY25 Change Q2 FY26 Q2 FY25 Change Revenue $4,651 $3,963 17% $4,651 $3,963 17% Operating Income $855 $593 44% $1,549 $1,260 23% Earnings Per Share $2.48 $1.67 49% $4.15 $3.32 25% Dollars are in millions, except earnings per share. See “About Non-GAAP Financial Measures” below for more information regarding financial measures not prepared in accordance with Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP). "We delivered a  Normalized numeric aliases: $4,651 = 4,651달러; $3,963 = 3,963달러; $855 = 855달러; $593 = 593달러; $1,549 = 1,549달러; $1,260 = 1,260달러; $2.48 = 2.48달러; $1.67 = 1.67달러; $3.32 = 3.32달러; $4.15 = 4.15달러; 4,651 million = 46억 5,100만 달러; 3,963 million = 39억 6,300만 달러; 1,549 million = 15억 4,900만 달러; 1,260 million = 12억 6,000만 달러.

"Our momentum across the company continues to give us high confidence in delivering double-digit revenue growth and expanding margin this year, and we are reiterating our full year guidance for fiscal 2026." Business Segment Results Global Business Solutions Global Business Solutions revenue grew to $3.2 billion, up 18 percent, and Online Ecosystem revenue increased to $2.5 billion, up 21 percent. • QuickBooks Online Accounting revenue grew 24 percent in the quarter, driven by higher effective prices, customer growth, and mix-shift. • Online Services revenue grew 18 percent, driven by growth in money and payroll offerings. • Total international online revenue grew 9 percent on a constant currency  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $616 million = 6억 1,600만 달러; $3.2 = 3.2달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $1.5 = 1.5달러; $616 = 616달러; 21 percent = 21%; 18 percent = 18%; 24 percent = 24%; 9 percent = 9%; 15 percent = 15%; 23 percent = 23%.
